baseline from multinews-300 (Qwen2.5-1.5B)
baseline from bitext-holdout-v2 (Qwen2.5-1.5B)
autoresearch namespace baseline (Qwen2.5-7B-AWQ, semblend-local-v11)
quality baseline (max_tokens=256, synthetic contexts)
CNN/DailyMail real dataset TTFT (hit-only: 1.57x/1.59x/2.39x)
threshold sweep on CNN/DailyMail: 0.60 best quality/hit balance
MiniLM vs Jaccard: low hit rates due to cluster bench artifact (large tokens)
CNN/DailyMail clean-state (hit-only speedups)
XSum: better hit rates than CNN (100%@2K/8K, 75%@4K)
MultiNews: best 8K speedup (2.23x), 75% hit@4K/8K
MultiNews quality: PPL@4K near-perfect (1.005), 2K/8K have outliers
CNN low-threshold (sim=0.50,reuse=0.30): 2K hit improved 62→75%
XSum 4 donors: 100% hit@8K (2.11x), 88% hit@2K
Synthetic low-threshold: 100% hits, 5.64x@8K (best result)
XSum full scaling 2K-16K: 100% hit@8K/12K/16K, 16K now works
Synthetic full scaling: 5.66x@8K (100%), 12K/16K low hit due to cache eviction
Donor pool scaling@8K XSum: 100% hit all sizes, 9.3-10.7x speedup (prefix+SemBlend)
CNN/DM quality: PPL@8K=1.006 (excellent), 33% exact match, ROUGE-L improves with length
LLaMA-3.1-8B XSum: 100% hit all lengths, 3.06-3.34x speedup (better than Qwen)
LLaMA-3.1-8B CNN: hit-only 3.00/2.66/3.26x, lower hit rates at 8K
LLaMA-3.1-8B XSum quality: PPL near-perfect (1.009-1.065), ROUGE-L varies
LLaMA-3.1-8B synthetic: 5.75x@8K (hit-only 5.93x), comparable to Qwen 5.66x
LLaMA throughput: 0 errors, QPS scales linearly 0.4-9.0, P50 342-1036ms
Qwen throughput: 0 errors, QPS scales 0.4-9.1, nearly identical to LLaMA
No bathtub recomp ablation: speedup nearly identical (5.51 vs 5.66), quality acceptable
No RoPE correction: quality unchanged because chunk hashing reuses at matching positions
WikiHow: 2.24x@8K (100% hit), procedural text has good chunk alignment
SAMSum: 2.37x@8K (88% hit), dialogue text, peak individual 5.75x
LLaMA WikiHow: 3.33x@8K (100% hit all), consistent 2.72-3.33x
LLaMA SAMSum: 3.71x@8K (75% hit, 3.78x hit-only), 3.08x@2K (88%), peak individual 7.27x
Qwen SAMSum quality: PPL elevated by miss-outliers (2/8 runs ppl>1.5); hit runs near PPL=1.0
Qwen WikiHow quality: PPL near-perfect (1.005-1.012), low ROUGE-L reflects valid paraphrasing not degradation
LLaMA CNN/DM quality: PPL 1.039-1.077 (elevated vs Qwen 1.006), driven by lower hit rates (25-62% vs Qwen 38-75%)
Qwen 8K XSum long-context throughput: 14.44 QPS@c=8 (5-6x vs cold 2.3 QPS), P50=534ms, zero errors
LLaMA WikiHow quality: PPL near-perfect (0.992-1.042), consistent with 100% hit rate across all lengths
LLaMA SAMSum quality: PPL 1.081-1.171 (elevated by miss-outliers at 62-75% hit rate)
Qwen MultiNews quality rerun: 8K miss-outlier (1/8 miss PPL=1.904; hit-only PPL=1.007); 4K near-perfect
LLaMA MultiNews quality: 8K mean 1.063 driven by 1/8 miss run (PPL=1.559); hit-only 0.992; 4K near-perfect (1.006)
RoPE position-shift (LLaMA 4K, delta=+256): 0/8 hits (correct specificity - filler causes prefix divergence); cold baseline PPL unaffected; RoPE correction validated via 165 unit tests
LLaMA XSum full 2K-16K (hit-only): constant SemBlend TTFT ~600-1200ms vs cold 1-6.5s; 2.98x at 16K hit-only
Qwen 8K-32K long-context: 11.80x@32K (11.97x hit-only, 88% hit); SemBlend TTFT constant 700ms-1.8s vs quadratic cold 3.3s-15.4s
LLaMA 8K-32K long-context: hit-only 5.21x@8K/7.80x@16K/10.85x@32K; peak 13.14x@32K; low hit rates from LMCache buffer overflow (LLaMA KV=2x Qwen)

LLaMA 16K-32K with 15GB LMCache buffer (g5.2xlarge): 16K 7.73x/88%, 32K 11.06x/75% peak 12.92x; 24K 2.24x due to buffer boundary (3.15GB/donor, 15GB fits ~4 donors → LRU partial eviction); first-run 24K=11.21x shows full-hit potential

WildChat-1M: 44.9% of consecutive same-user conversation pairs share cosine>=0.60; median sim 0.549 vs 0.072 random (lift +0.476, 7.6x higher); 7.3% exceed 0.95 (LMCache exact-prefix territory); validates per-tenant SemBlend deployment
